message:
feat(api): add OpenAPI specification generation

internal/serve/openapi.go (new):
- OpenAPI 3.0 spec generation for ntm kernel API
- Auto-documents all REST endpoints with schemas
- Generates JSON output for API clients

internal/serve/openapi_test.go (new):
- Test coverage for OpenAPI generation

internal/cli/openapi.go (new):
- CLI command to generate OpenAPI spec
- Outputs to stdout or file

docs/openapi-kernel.json (new):
- Pre-generated OpenAPI spec for kernel API
- Useful for API client generation and documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
